title: pinaropappus pattersonii
intro: Pinaropappus pattersonii, also known as the Patterson's needle grass, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Pinaropappus pattersonii include reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as supporting wound healing and skin health. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
